content:
⚖️ Legal Assistant- Company Law


Build your legal career with global exposure!

At Viable Outsource Solution, we're looking for passionate and driven legal professionals who are eager to work on both Indian and international legal matters in a fast-paced Legal Process Outsourcing (LPO) environment.

If you have a strong foundation in litigation, legal drafting, and client communication, this is your opportunity to work on diverse legal assignments while expanding your professional expertise.
  

📍 Position Details
🏢 Company: Viable Outsource Solution
 📌 Location: Noida, Sector 63, H Block
 💼 Role:  Legal Assistant- Company Lawyer
 🕙 Working Hours: 10:00 AM – 7:00 PM (Day Shift)
 👨‍⚖️ Experience Required: 1–3 Years
 💰 Salary: Upto ₹22K-25K CTC 
 🌍 Industry: Legal Process Outsourcing (LPO) – Indian & International Legal Services
🚀 Immediate Joiners Preferred

 Candidates who can join from Tuesday will be given priority.
  

🎯 What You'll Be Working On
✔️ Drafting legal notices, agreements, contracts, leases, and other legal documents
✔️ Conducting legal research and preparing case summaries
✔️ Supporting litigation and corporate legal matters
✔️ Reviewing legal documents with precision and attention to detail
✔️ Coordinating with clients and legal professionals on Indian as well as international legal assignments
✔️ Ensuring timely, accurate, and high-quality legal deliverables
  

✅ We're Looking For
✔️ Valid Bar Council Enrollment
✔️ 1–3 years of experience in Litigation or Corporate Law
✔️ Excellent legal drafting and research skills
✔️ Strong written and verbal English communication
✔️ Ability to work independently and manage multiple legal matters
✔️ A proactive, detail-oriented, and professional approach
  

🌟 Why Join Viable Outsource Solution?
✨ Exposure to Indian and international legal work
✨ Opportunity to work in a growing and professional LPO environment
✨ Continuous learning across multiple legal domains
✨ Collaborative and performance-driven work culture
✨ Career growth with hands-on legal experience
  

📅 Application Deadline: 4th July

📩 Send your resume to: 8439421717


Take the next step in your legal career and become part of a team that's redefining legal outsourcing with quality, professionalism, and global standards. We look forward to connecting with you!
Viable Outsource Solution Namya Gupta
